name: Anaerobic biogas digestate (municipal wastewater sludge, poly-aluminum-chloride/ferric-chloride precipitated) amended with N2O in a He headspace (PMC8776835)
description: Anaerobic biogas digestate (municipal wastewater sludge, poly-aluminum-chloride/ferric-chloride precipitated) amended with N2O in a He headspace — medium reported in PMC8776835 (complex/undefined base — extracts not BiGG-mappable).

provenance.citation: Medium composition from PMC8776835 (see GrowthDB record).
provenance.notes: Complex medium: chemically-defined portion mapped to BiGG; biological extracts listed in `unmapped`. Added via GrowthDB curation.

components.name: N2O (headspace, replenished by repeated injection, ~5 mM in liquid)

uncovered.name: NH4+-N (in digestate)
uncovered.note: undefined/complex ingredient; represented elsewhere as an in-silico approximation, no single exchange
